description: Full climate card for one destination: 0–100 Sunshine Score, day/night °C, rainfall and sea temperature for all 12 months, plus its sunniest month ("best time to visit" for sunshine) and annual sunshine hours. Accepts a city name ("Faro"), "city, country" ("Nice, France") or IATA airport code ("FAO"

description.name: compare_destinations
description.description: Side-by-side sunshine/climate comparison of 2–5 destinations — overall or for one month ("Algarve or Crete in October?"). Returns each place's Sunshine Score, temperatures, rain and sea temperature, plus a one-line verdict of which is sunnier.
